name: Perpetua Resources Corp.
description: Perpetua Resources Corp. is a development-stage mining company focused on the exploration, site restoration, and redevelopment of the Stibnite Gold Project in central Idaho. The company aims to restore an abandoned mining site while producing gold and critical minerals, specifically antimony, which is essential for national defense and clean energy technologies. By utilizing sustainable mining practices and fostering transparent community partnerships, Perpetua Resources seeks to provide economic benefits to the local region while addressing historical environmental impacts, ultimately contributing to a secure and sustainable domestic supply chain for critical minerals in the United States.
